title: ischyrolepis setiger
side_effects: Ischyrolepis setiger can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and skin irritation. In rare cases, consuming large amounts of the plant can lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Prolonged exposure to the plant's essential oils can cause respiratory problems, including bronchitis and asthma attacks. Additionally, improper handling of the plant can cause physical harm, such as cuts and burns from the thorns or sap.
